data.title: Initialize go spike contract
data.context: Reusable repo-local agent workflow stack. Make go/go-auto/go-loop practical: route rough Viggo commands, create or repair repo-local .go state, execute autonomously inside safety gates, validate with tests, and document exact operator usage.
data.decision: Use repo-local .go vision, principles, epics, tasks, evidence, and go auto loop for this project.
consequences: go auto can continue from repo state

data.title: Make go-auto executable through a run envelope
data.context: go auto must be control handoff, not only task-list output; Hermes needs machine-readable preflight, budget, stop, checkpoint, and result boundaries.
data.decision: go auto emits execution_policy and run_envelope; repo-local go-workflow-stack now owns its own .go vision, principles, tasks, evidence, and decisions.
consequences: Hermes can execute go auto with less chat inference
Future executor work can target the auto-run-result schema
